name: First Cut
description: Four rounds of a run, legless rope climbs, and heavy squat snatches — an elimination-style cut event, with only the top finishers advancing to the next round of competition.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2019/1 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; top 75 athletes score points, the rest are ranked with 0
